TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Chenlie == Chenlie (1946 miheca 1 folad 17 romi'ad-), tadanganga ci Chen Ruilin, o nano Ciayi tamdaw no Taywan, micudaday to tilid, sician tamdaw. Kasofocan Ci Chenlie misawad mitilid i Ciayi kawcong, mitilid misawad i Tanciang wenli kakkoyin. Ikor malasingsi no Kocong, 1969 mihecaan nai Kalingko 2 miheca malasingsi mamiseking to kingkiwso. Nikawrira i 1972 miheca 1 folad i Truku Cankuangsi pitilidan ho marepet, matefoc to 4 miheca 8 folad. I 1976 miheca masadak pasi mifalicay ato mitiliday ko demak, i 1980 miheca o "Awaay ko ka'intelan" pakaala to saka 3 rekad no Sepao (timaes) tilidan tawciker kompay a sa'ayaway, saka 2 miheca o "Ni'oripan i sekal" miliyaw haca cikompay; i 1991 miheca o "Ma0da'ocay lotok" a tilid saka 14 rekad no Sepao (timaes) tilidan pa'ayawan kompay; i 2013 miheca misa'opo to niyah nai 1983 miheca tangasa 2007 miheca nitilidan a tawciker tilidan: soni no nitengilan, tomecekay ko nengneng, masafaniyotay ko aro', pa'awasay ko rakat. Mirina' i "Rencien. Yinsiang"; i 2014 miheca "Pasekaay a radiw" mapakompay no Taywan tilidan kompay patilidan tawcikeray kompay, toya miheca saka 1 rekad Lienhepao tilidad kompay . I 2018 miheca, pakaala to "Kaheciday pala" mapili' "Mamo'etepay matilliday no Taywan tamdaw" . Ci Chenlie ona mimikihatiyaay micefong to sician tayal, malakakeridan no Mincucinpotang Kalingko tangpo , milifetay to kakeridan(sicang) no kalingkosi ato singkiw no Seniyin no Taywan, nika caay pakaala; i 1996 miheca maala to saka 3 rekad Komindaykay dayhiw . I 2009 miheca tangasa 2010 miheca o maro'ay pitilidan no Tonghua daykako a matiliday. I 2019 miheca 7 fola tangasa 2020 miheca 11 foladan, Salongoc no kitakit Pookang kahecalay katalawan Cinme piharatengan koyin citodongay maro' a matiliday tamdaw . To yaan i, o tilidan no tawciker "Tamita romadiw kita" maparocek i 2023 miheca Hongkong congsie sasekingan (kowaping) seeking a papeloan nanengnengen a tilid. 2023 miheca 6 folad, malakakeridan no paso'elinay ci Lai widangan no Kalingko kowan. Nitilidan Tawciker 5."殘骸書"(台北:印刻,2023) Kaemangay tilidan Pinengnengan to tilid 2.楊翠. 緩行,繞行, 2011-09-14).
S.PHON: == ʦħənɾiə == ʦħənɾiə (**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ-), taɬ~ɮaŋaŋa ʦi ʦħən ro~u~uiɾin, o~u nano~u ʦiaji tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan, miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, siʦian tamɬ~ɮaw. kaso~ufo~uʦan ʦi ʦħənɾiə misawaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ i ʦiaji kawʦo~uŋ, mitiɾiɬ~ɮ misawaɬ~ɮ i tanʦiaŋ wənɾi kakko~ujin. iko~ur maɾasiŋsi no~u ko~uʦo~uŋ, **** miħəʦaan nai kaɾiŋko~u * miħəʦa maɾasiŋsi mamisəkiŋ to~u kiŋkiwso~u. nikawrira i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ i tro~u~uko~u~u ʦanko~u~uaŋsi pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ħo~u marəpət, matəfo~uʦ to~u * miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ. i **** miħəʦa masaɬ~ɮak pasi mifaɾiʦaj ato~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, i **** miħəʦa o~u "awaaj ko~u kaʡintəɾan" pakaaɾa to~u saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ no~u səpao~u (timaəs) tiɾiɬ~ɮan tawʦikər ko~umpaj a saʡajawaj, saka * miħəʦa o~u "niʡo~uripan i səkaɾ" miɾijaw ħaʦa ʦiko~umpaj; i **** miħəʦa o~u "ma*ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj ɾo~uto~uk" a tiɾiɬ~ɮ saka ** rəkaɬ~ɮ no~u səpao~u (timaəs) tiɾiɬ~ɮan paʡajawan ko~umpaj; i **** miħəʦa misaʡo~upo~u to~u nijaħ nai **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦa nitiɾiɬ~ɮan a tawʦikər tiɾiɬ~ɮan: so~uni no~u nitəŋiɾan, to~uməʦəkaj ko~u nəŋnəŋ, masafanijo~utaj ko~u aro~uʡ, paʡawasaj ko~u rakat. mirinaʡ i "rənʦiən. jinsiaŋ"; i **** miħəʦa "pasəkaaj a raɬ~ɮiw" mapako~umpaj no~u tajwan tiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~umpaj patiɾiɬ~ɮan tawʦikəraj ko~umpaj, to~uja miħəʦa saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ ɾiənħəpao~u tiɾiɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ko~umpaj . i **** miħəʦa, pakaaɾa to~u "kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj paɾa" mapiɾiʡ "mamo~uʡətəpaj matiɾɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw" . ʦi ʦħənɾiə o~una mimikiħatijaaj miʦəfo~uŋ to~u siʦian tajaɾ, maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u minʦo~u~uʦinpo~utaŋ kaɾiŋko~u taŋpo~u , miɾifətaj to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan(siʦaŋ) no~u kaɾiŋko~usi ato~u siŋkiw no~u sənijin no~u tajwan, nika ʦaaj pakaaɾa; i **** miħəʦa maaɾa to~u saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ ko~uminɬ~ɮajkaj ɬ~ɮajħiw . i **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦa o~u maro~uʡaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u to~uŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u a matiɾiɬ~ɮaj. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾa taŋasa **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan, saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u kitakit po~uo~ukaŋ kaħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan ʦinmə piħaratəŋan ko~ujin ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj maro~uʡ a matiɾiɬ~ɮaj tamɬ~ɮaw . to~u jaan i, o~u tiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u tawʦikər "tamita ro~umaɬ~ɮiw kita" maparo~uʦək i **** miħəʦa ħo~uŋko~uŋ ʦo~uŋsiə sasəkiŋan (ko~uwapiŋ) səəkiŋ a papəɾo~uan nanəŋnəŋən a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u paso~uʡəɾinaj ʦi ɾai wiɬ~ɮaŋan no~u kaɾiŋko~u ko~uwan. nitiɾiɬ~ɮan tawʦikər *."***"(**:**,****) kaəmaŋaj tiɾiɬ~ɮan pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ *.**. **,**, ****-**-**).
S.FORM: == Chenlie == Chenlie (1946 miheca 1 folad 17 romi'ad-), tadanganga ci Chen Ruilin, o nano Ciayi tamdaw no Taywan, micudaday to tilid, sician tamdaw. Kasofocan Ci Chenlie misawad mitilid i Ciayi kawcong, mitilid misawad i Tanciang wenli kakkoyin. Ikor malasingsi no Kocong, 1969 mihecaan nai Kalingko 2 miheca malasingsi mamiseking to kingkiwso. Nikawrira i 1972 miheca 1 folad i Truku Cankuangsi pitilidan ho marepet, matefoc to 4 miheca 8 folad. I 1976 miheca masadak pasi mifalicay ato mitiliday ko demak, i 1980 miheca o "Awaay ko ka'intelan" pakaala to saka 3 rekad no Sepao (timaes) tilidan tawciker kompay a sa'ayaway, saka 2 miheca o "Ni'oripan i sekal" miliyaw haca cikompay; i 1991 miheca o "Ma0da'ocay lotok" a tilid saka 14 rekad no Sepao (timaes) tilidan pa'ayawan kompay; i 2013 miheca misa'opo to niyah nai 1983 miheca tangasa 2007 miheca nitilidan a tawciker tilidan: soni no nitengilan, tomecekay ko nengneng, masafaniyotay ko aro', pa'awasay ko rakat. Mirina' i "Rencien. Yinsiang"; i 2014 miheca "Pasekaay a radiw" mapakompay no Taywan tilidan kompay patilidan tawcikeray kompay, toya miheca saka 1 rekad Lienhepao tilidad kompay . I 2018 miheca, pakaala to "Kaheciday pala" mapili' "Mamo'etepay matilliday no Taywan tamdaw" . Ci Chenlie ona mimikihatiyaay micefong to sician tayal, malakakeridan no Mincucinpotang Kalingko tangpo , milifetay to kakeridan(sicang) no kalingkosi ato singkiw no Seniyin no Taywan, nika caay pakaala; i 1996 miheca maala to saka 3 rekad Komindaykay dayhiw . I 2009 miheca tangasa 2010 miheca o maro'ay pitilidan no Tonghua daykako a matiliday. I 2019 miheca 7 fola tangasa 2020 miheca 11 foladan, Salongoc no kitakit Pookang kahecalay katalawan Cinme piharatengan koyin citodongay maro' a matiliday tamdaw . To yaan i, o tilidan no tawciker "Tamita romadiw kita" maparocek i 2023 miheca Hongkong congsie sasekingan (kowaping) seeking a papeloan nanengnengen a tilid. 2023 miheca 6 folad, malakakeridan no paso'elinay ci Lai widangan no Kalingko kowan. Nitilidan Tawciker 5."殘骸書"(台北:印刻,2023) Kaemangay tilidan Pinengnengan to tilid 2.楊翠. 緩行,繞行, 2011-09-14).
S.PHON: == ʦħənɾiə == ʦħənɾiə (**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ-), taɬ~ɮaŋaŋa ʦi ʦħən ro~u~uiɾin, o~u nano~u ʦiaji tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan, miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, siʦian tamɬ~ɮaw. kaso~ufo~uʦan ʦi ʦħənɾiə misawaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ i ʦiaji kawʦo~uŋ, mitiɾiɬ~ɮ misawaɬ~ɮ i tanʦiaŋ wənɾi kakko~ujin. iko~ur maɾasiŋsi no~u ko~uʦo~uŋ, **** miħəʦaan nai kaɾiŋko~u * miħəʦa maɾasiŋsi mamisəkiŋ to~u kiŋkiwso~u. nikawrira i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ i tro~u~uko~u~u ʦanko~u~uaŋsi pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ħo~u marəpət, matəfo~uʦ to~u * miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ. i **** miħəʦa masaɬ~ɮak pasi mifaɾiʦaj ato~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, i **** miħəʦa o~u "awaaj ko~u kaʡintəɾan" pakaaɾa to~u saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ no~u səpao~u (timaəs) tiɾiɬ~ɮan tawʦikər ko~umpaj a saʡajawaj, saka * miħəʦa o~u "niʡo~uripan i səkaɾ" miɾijaw ħaʦa ʦiko~umpaj; i **** miħəʦa o~u "ma*ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj ɾo~uto~uk" a tiɾiɬ~ɮ saka ** rəkaɬ~ɮ no~u səpao~u (timaəs) tiɾiɬ~ɮan paʡajawan ko~umpaj; i **** miħəʦa misaʡo~upo~u to~u nijaħ nai **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦa nitiɾiɬ~ɮan a tawʦikər tiɾiɬ~ɮan: so~uni no~u nitəŋiɾan, to~uməʦəkaj ko~u nəŋnəŋ, masafanijo~utaj ko~u aro~uʡ, paʡawasaj ko~u rakat. mirinaʡ i "rənʦiən. jinsiaŋ"; i **** miħəʦa "pasəkaaj a raɬ~ɮiw" mapako~umpaj no~u tajwan tiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~umpaj patiɾiɬ~ɮan tawʦikəraj ko~umpaj, to~uja miħəʦa saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ ɾiənħəpao~u tiɾiɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ko~umpaj . i **** miħəʦa, pakaaɾa to~u "kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj paɾa" mapiɾiʡ "mamo~uʡətəpaj matiɾɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw" . ʦi ʦħənɾiə o~una mimikiħatijaaj miʦəfo~uŋ to~u siʦian tajaɾ, maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u minʦo~u~uʦinpo~utaŋ kaɾiŋko~u taŋpo~u , miɾifətaj to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan(siʦaŋ) no~u kaɾiŋko~usi ato~u siŋkiw no~u sənijin no~u tajwan, nika ʦaaj pakaaɾa; i **** miħəʦa maaɾa to~u saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ ko~uminɬ~ɮajkaj ɬ~ɮajħiw . i **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦa o~u maro~uʡaj pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u to~uŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u a matiɾiɬ~ɮaj. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾa taŋasa **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan, saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u kitakit po~uo~ukaŋ kaħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan ʦinmə piħaratəŋan ko~ujin ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj maro~uʡ a matiɾiɬ~ɮaj tamɬ~ɮaw . to~u jaan i, o~u tiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u tawʦikər "tamita ro~umaɬ~ɮiw kita" maparo~uʦək i **** miħəʦa ħo~uŋko~uŋ ʦo~uŋsiə sasəkiŋan (ko~uwapiŋ) səəkiŋ a papəɾo~uan nanəŋnəŋən a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan no~u paso~uʡəɾinaj ʦi ɾai wiɬ~ɮaŋan no~u kaɾiŋko~u ko~uwan. nitiɾiɬ~ɮan tawʦikər *."***"(**:**,****) kaəmaŋaj tiɾiɬ~ɮan pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ *.**. **,**, ****-**-**).
